items.title: Introducing GPT-5.3 Instant, GPT-5.4 Thinking, and GPT-5.4 Pro - OpenAI Academy
items.author: academy.openai.com
items.snippet:
OpenAI has released several major model updates in early 2026. GPT-5.3-Codex launched as OpenAI's most capable agentic coding model, combining the Codex and GPT-5 training stacks for best-in-class code generation and reasoning, running approximately 25% faster and setting new benchmark highs. GPT-5.4 was also released as the newest frontier model for professional work, available via the Chat Completions and Responses API, with a GPT-5.4 Pro variant for compute-intensive tasks.

The model family

items.title: Developer changelog | OpenAI
items.author: developers.openai.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has released several significant API updates in early 2026. Most notably, GPT-5.4 mini and GPT-5.4 nano were added to the Chat Completions and Responses API, with GPT-5.4 mini supporting built-in tool search, computer use, and context compaction for high-volume workloads, while GPT-5.4 nano is optimized for speed and cost on simpler tasks. The Sora API was also expanded with reusable character references, longer video generation up to 20 seconds, 1080p output, and Batch API support. Addit

items.title: Introducing Prism
items.author: openai.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has published several new research papers and tools in early 2026. Key highlights include the launch of Prism, a LaTeX-native workspace powered by GPT-5.2 designed to help researchers write, collaborate, and reason in one place. OpenAI also introduced FrontierScience, a new expert-written benchmark spanning physics, chemistry, and biology with two tracks — Olympiad and Research — aimed at evaluating AI's ability to perform genuine scientific research tasks. Additionally, OpenAI released r

items.title: OpenAI Newsroom | Company Announcements | OpenAI
items.author: openai.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has been active with product and business announcements in late March 2026. On the product side, ChatGPT gained expanded shopping features with richer visual product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and a Walmart in-ChatGPT integration rolling out to free, Plus, and Pro users. The platform also added simplified mobile sidebar navigation and optional location sharing controls for more relevant local recommendations, weather, and news — launching on iOS and web first. ChatGPT Enterprise
